_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremA_mask_perturbation.py (A2). Mirrors the A2Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §8.2. A2 is the FAITHFUL theorem-A perturbation diagnostic — it compares the empirical full-model forward error around GD-compatibility against the full additive (A, B)-operator reduced perturbation bound, with A-side and B-side reported separately.
